pageContext.name: Friday the 13th 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: We are thrilled – and terrified – to announce a new 1oz pure silver coin for the iconic Crystal Lake mass murderer, Jason Voorhees, from the horror film franchise, Friday the 13th.   This terrifying piece is frosted and shaped to replicate the hockey mask of the psycho killer. Some mirror flashes and a colored engraving of the film name add extra appeal to the design. This realistic look is sure to give you the heebie-jeebies! The Public Seal of Niue can be found on the obverse, confirming it is a legal tender coin.   Each coin comes in specially designed packaging, incorporating another disturbing image of Jason. Printed at the back of the box is the Certificate of Authenticity, along with confirmation of the coin's unique serial number in the limited 2,000 mintage.   Embrace the spooky vibes of this classic today!
